segments.scene_description: A static view of a sunlit greenhouse classroom with stone walls and a glass roof. Students in robes work at wooden tables arranged throughout the space, tending to magical plants and herbs. The scene is filled with dense vegetation including hanging ferns and potted plants, with a large orange gourd prominently displayed on the central table. A small bird briefly flies through the lower right portion of the frame midway through the clip.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, cinematic gaze over a sunlit greenhouse classroom where students engage in the study of magical herbology. It begins with a wide view of the space, highlighting the contrast between the sturdy stone walls and the transparent glass roof that allows bright light to flood the interior. As the camera lingers, the focus settles on students in robes tending to dense vegetation and hanging ferns, with a large orange gourd serving as a central point of interest on the wooden tables. The stillness of the scene is briefly interrupted as a small bird flutters through the lower right of the frame, adding a touch of organic movement to the scholarly atmosphere.
